title: Jarvis companion mod
description: This mod adds the famous J.A.R.V.I.S (Just a Rather Very Intelligent System ) as a companion to your Minecraft Java!
body:
# **This is J.A.R.V.I.S**

**_An inspired project from the movie "IRON MAN"_**

## **This mod futures:**

_Inventory sorting, interactive Jarvis with chat ( start using Jarvis with saying "Jarvis" in chat and if you have a new command or sentence always say "Jarvis" and then send your message ), Hologram of Jarvis, "Jarvis configuration menu" by pressing J and gemini integration ( you will have to create your own Api key and paste it in the section in the "Jarvis configuration menu" ), waypoint system, recipe searching, browsing and YouTube search! Have fun!_

**_Note: The waypoint system works for one point only!_**

### **==> Link to curse forge also: [Jarvis on Curse Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jarvis-mod) <==**

### _Author: NoTrixy._

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
